summary_one_line: Reach hb_ot_old_tag_from_script with an HB_SCRIPT_INVALID (sentinel) script after navigating multi-stage tag/language parsing, hitting the switch's default-script case.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A font/tag input that drives the parsed script value to the HB_SCRIPT_INVALID sentinel (the switch operand at line 41 must equal the INVALID constant), reaching the case at line 43.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog resolves 10/10; its winning seeds carry an I2S-floor (mutation_op = -) ancestor in lineage, indicating I2SRandReplace substituted the operand bytes that steer script to the INVALID/default-script comparison target.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator, so it must blindly mutate the bytes feeding the script value; it resolves only 2/10 and stays blocked 8/10 with avg blocked duration 22.10h.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: I2SRandReplace (cmplog input-to-state): the CmpLogObserver records the script-vs-constant comparison operands and the mutator substitutes the matching operand into the input, the technique value_profile lacks but value_profile_cmplog adds.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same INVALID-script reaching input, but arrived at by progressively closing the multi-byte distance on the chained tag/language comparisons (lang_matches, parse_private_use_subtag) that gate which script value is produced.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog adds CMP_MAP gradient feedback; it preserves intermediate inputs that get the chained tag comparisons closer to matching, so it resolves 10/10 where cmplog (no CMP_MAP) resolves only 2/10.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog has no CMP_MAP gradient feedback, so partial-progress inputs on the lang/tag comparison chain are not retained as corpus; cmplog stays blocked 8/10 with avg blocked duration 19.90h.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: CMP_MAP gradient (value_profile Hamming/prefix-distance feedback): new CMP_MAP buckets for closer-matching operand pairs preserve intermediate inputs, the technique cmplog lacks but value_profile_cmplog adds.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the HB_SCRIPT_INVALID case arm returning the default script tag inside a switch on the script value.
The switch operand is the script value, so reaching the INVALID arm requires the parsed script to equal the INVALID sentinel.
value_profile_cmplog resolves the branch 10/10 while value_profile resolves only 2/10 (loser, delta I2S).
value_profile lacks the I2SRandReplace mutator entirely.
I2SRandReplace reads the CmpLogObserver buffer, matches one operand in the input, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile loser stays blocked with a long avg blocked duration of 22.10h.
value_profile_cmplog resolves 10/10 while cmplog resolves only 2/10 (loser, delta value_profile).
value_profile's CMP_MAP feedback preserves an input that produces a CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any seen before.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: The path to the blocker traverses chained tag/language comparison functions including lang_matches.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: hb-ot-tag.cc:lang_matches(char const*, char const*, char const*, unsigned int)

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog loser stays blocked with avg blocked duration 19.90h.
The winning seeds are discovered by value_profile_cmplog.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 6214 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 846fa0fa582cf403`; the chain has 33 ancestor levels and the tool reports an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 32, confirming an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in the vpc winner's ancestry

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating the INVALID/default-script switch arm on a single exact-magic comparison where value_profile alone (no I2S) resolves it as fast as value_profile_cmplog, showing CMP_MAP gradient suffices and I2S is not required.

weakest_evidence_point: Whether the script value reaching the switch is governed by a single I2S-solvable magic comparison versus a multi-stage chain — the source shows the switch operand but not the dataflow that sets the INVALID sentinel.
